name: Vicinity Centres
analysis: VCX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.6000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.6000, stop A$2.4750, target A$2.9750 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
